title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that routes different development phases to Claude Opus and Gemini 3.5 Flash based on each model's strengths: Opus for planning and integration logic, Gemini for frontend design and UI generation. The approach leverages Gemini's superior visual output and lower cost while using Opus for complex reasoning tasks.
